message:
fix: propagate BEADS_DOLT_PORT to agent sessions

Agent tmux sessions were missing GT_DOLT_PORT/BEADS_DOLT_PORT env vars,
causing bd to auto-start rogue Dolt server instances instead of
connecting to the centralized one. AgentEnv() now propagates both vars,
gt up sets them after Dolt starts, and the daemon sets them from config.

Cherry-picked from DreadPirateRobertz/gastown@56676ba (PR #2472)
Closes #2412

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
